item.name: Wivre Horn
item.description: When blown, this horn produces a deep, booming sound that summons forth your mighty wivre.

mount.name: Wivre
mount.action: Summon forth your wivre, a mighty horned beast said to be nature's battering ram.
mount.description: Native to the New World, these ill-mannered scalekin are notoriously difficult to tame. Yet where others have failed, the Mamool Ja have succeeded, their people employing wivres as beasts of burden and weapons of war both.
mount.tooltip:
I pray that you at least consider
a watchful trot into danger rather
than a headlong charge...
- Iliud
